title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 231.350 - Road overseer's duties
text:
231.350.  Road overseer's duties. — The road overseer and county highway engineer shall have the same control over and their duties in relation to streets and alleys in said towns and villages shall be the same as in relation to roads and highways on public roads.
(RSMo 1939 § 8563) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7916; 1919 § 10704; 1909 § 10506
